import re, json, textwrap, unicodedata
text = open("/mnt/data/file-GTeuoYkHyhNTk6GCdd2GsB-text_to_analyse.txt", "r", encoding="utf-8").read()

quotes = [
    'وَقَدْ خَلَتْ مِنْ أَهْلِهَا وَإِنِ امْرَأَتُهُ لَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ مِنْ بَعْدُ شَاكِرًا',
    'وَلَمَكُورَ مِنَ اللَّهِ عَلى الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ',
    'أَخَذَ النَبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم بِسَعْدِ بْنِ أَبِي وَقَّاصٍ فَقَالَ لَهُ يَا سَعْدُ أَخَذَ اللَهُ بِكَ مِنَ الْأَثَرِ وَإِنَّ اللَهَ لَأَخَذُ الْعُضُدِ بِالرِدَائِ',
]

positions = []
for q in quotes:
    idx = text.find(f'"{q}"')
    if idx == -1:
        # try without quotes? or with Arabic quotes? currently ascii quotes are used
        idx = text.find(q)
        quote_present = False
    else:
        quote_present = True
    if idx != -1:
        # Determine exact start and end excluding quotes
        start = idx + 1 if quote_present else idx
        end = start + len(q)
        positions.append((q, start, end))
    else:
        positions.append((q, None, None))
positions

import re
text = open("/mnt/data/file-GTeuoYkHyhNTk6GCdd2GsB-text_to_analyse.txt", "r", encoding="utf-8").read()
pattern = 'فقال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم: "'
indices = [m.start() for m in re.finditer(re.escape(pattern), text)]
len(indices), indices[:5]

pattern2 = 'فقال لها رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم: "'
indices2 = [m.start() for m in re.finditer(re.escape(pattern2), text)]
len(indices2), indices2

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":272,"span_end":357,"span_text":"وَقَدْ خَلَتْ مِنْ أَهْلِهَا وَإِنِ امْرَأَتُهُ لَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ مِنْ بَعْدُ شَاكِرًا","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"النور","sura_number":24,"aya_number":11},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":388,"span_end":449,"span_text":"وَلَمَكُورَ مِنَ اللَّهِ عَلى الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"النور","sura_number":24,"aya_number":12},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":475,"span_end":643,"span_text":"أَخَذَ النَبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم بِسَعْدِ بْنِ أَبِي وَقَّاصٍ فَقَالَ لَهُ يَا سَعْدُ أَخَذَ اللَهُ بِكَ مِنَ الْأَثَرِ وَإِنَّ اللَهَ لَأَخَذُ الْعُضُدِ بِالرِدَائِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{ "sura_name": "", "sura_number": 0, "aya_number": 0 },"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true}]}

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
